text: Tucker Carlson: If you are the strongest military in the world, why can’t you force Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz? We’re really not as powerful as we said we were. How did this ‘primitive country’ just humiliate us? That’s bad for us, but it’s also dangerous because it invites aggression. We need to fix that by being honest about what just happened. No more lying.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：如果你是世界上最强军队，为何不能迫使伊朗开放霍尔木兹海峡？我们其实没有自称的那么强大。这个‘原始国家’怎会刚刚羞辱了我们？这对我们不利，但也危险，因为它会招致侵略。我们需要通过诚实地面对刚发生的事来修正这一点，别再撒谎了。

text: “Not Our Problem” - U.S. Shrugs Off Lebanon Amid Ceasefire Rift The U.S.-Iran ceasefire is already fraying, with Vice President JD Vance dismissing Lebanon as irrelevant to ceasefire. Tehran has halted shipping via Hormuz & have threatened retaliation, claiming the U.S. "can't continue the war through Israel" if it wants the ceasefire. READ MORE
text_zh: “‘与我们无关’——美国在停火分歧中对黎巴嫩置之不理 美伊停火协议已出现裂痕，副总统JD·万斯称黎巴嫩与停火无关。德黑兰已停止经霍尔木兹海峡的航运，并威胁报复，声称美国若想维持停火，‘就不能通过以色列继续战争’。阅读更多

text: Tucker Carlson on Israeli airstrikes in Lebanon: You know what the name of the military operation was? Eternal Darkness. Eternal darkness… is a euphemism for hell. That’s exactly what Israel brought to Christians in Lebanon. These are civilians who were murdered… using American weapons and American tax dollars. All of it stopped by Operation Eternal Darkness targeting civilians.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈以色列在黎巴嫩的空袭：你知道这次军事行动叫什么吗？永恒黑暗。永恒黑暗……是地狱的委婉说法。这正是以色列带给黎巴嫩基督徒的。这些是被谋杀的平民……用的是美国武器和美国纳税人的钱。这一切都因以平民为目标的‘永恒黑暗行动’而停止。

text: Launches from Hezbollah
text_zh: 真主党发射行动

text: Tucker Carlson: Israel is your client state. This is like taking orders from your housekeeper, which you would never do. Why can’t the United States get its proxy, its client state… under control? Why can’t this president or any president say no to Israel? We have a right to know why. There are… a lot of people in the White House who care about the United States.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：以色列是你的附庸国。这就像听从你家保洁员的命令，而你绝不会这么做。为什么美国不能控制其代理人、其附庸国……？为什么这任或任何一任总统都不能对以色列说不？我们有权知道原因。白宫里有很多……关心美国的人。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation will be in Islamabad for talks tonight — Iran's ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam “Despite skepticism of Iranian public opinion due to repeated ceasefire violations by Israeli regime”" 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim on X: "Iran's ambassador to Pakistan deleted his tweet regarding the planned arrival of the Iranian delegation in Islamabad , the capital of Pakistan." Original post: https://x.com/IranAmbPak/status/2042108345121968376
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench镜像：“🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡进行会谈——伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使雷扎·阿米里·穆加达姆‘尽管伊朗公众因以色列政权屡次违反停火而持怀疑态度’” 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Tasnim在X上报道：“伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使删除了关于伊朗代表团计划抵达巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡的推文。” 原帖：https://x.com/IranAmbPak/status/2042108345121968376

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah: Israeli forces located inside a house in the Al-Tyeba were targeted by a missile, resulting in casualties.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡ 🇮🇱 真主党：位于阿尔泰贝的一所房屋内的以色列部队遭到导弹袭击，造成伤亡。

text: Former Israeli PM Naftali Bennett: The goals of the war were clear: the complete and permanent dismantling of the Iranian nuclear program… These goals were not achieved. Failure will leave Israel facing a more vengeful and determined Iran that will race toward a nuclear weapon. All their empty promises have blown up in our faces. A government that dismantles Israel from within cannot defeat the enemy from the outside.
text_zh: 以色列前总理纳夫塔利·贝内特：战争目标明确：彻底且永久地废除伊朗核计划…这些目标未能实现。失败将使以色列面对一个更具报复心和决心的伊朗，其将加速发展核武器。他们所有空洞的承诺都已在我们面前破灭。一个从内部瓦解以色列的政府，无法从外部击败敌人。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan says the Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad tonight for “serious talks” based on the 10 points proposed by Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan has deleted his tweet saying the Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad tonight for “serious talks”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness："⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使表示，伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡，基于伊朗提出的10点建议进行‘严肃会谈’。@wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使已删除其推文，该推文称伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡进行‘严肃会谈’。@wfwitness

text: Shut out of U.S.–Iran peace talks, Israel is heavily striking Lebanon. At least 254 people have been killed and over 1,000 wounded, with some estimates putting the death toll closer to 300 just since yesterday. By relentlessly attacking Lebanon without distinguishing between military and civilian targets, Israel seems to be deliberately trying to force Iran to retaliate and become the party that violates the ceasefire.
text_zh: 被排除在美国-伊朗和平谈判之外，以色列正猛烈打击黎巴嫩。自昨天以来，至少254人死亡，超过1000人受伤，一些估计死亡人数接近300。通过不分军事和民用目标持续攻击黎巴嫩，以色列似乎有意试图迫使伊朗报复，成为违反停火的一方。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 CNA: The Philippines has opened its first dedicated coast guard command on Thitu (Pagasa) Island in the disputed Spratly Islands, covering 68,000 sq km. The base will include a commodore-level commander, permanent ship, response vessels, specialists, and a dredged port for docking. Pagasa Island is home to about 400 Filipinos, mostly fishermen and their families, whom China claims are living there illegally. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇭 🇨🇳 中央社：菲律宾已在争议的南沙群岛中的中业岛（帕加萨岛）开设首个专属海岸警卫队指挥部，覆盖面积68,000平方公里。该基地将包括一名准将级指挥官、常驻舰艇、响应船只、专家以及疏浚的码头供停泊。帕加萨岛居住着约400名菲律宾人，主要是渔民及其家庭，中国声称他们非法居住于此。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “US must choose ceasefire or continued war via Israel. It cannot have both” — Iran’s FM Araghchi
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “美国必须选择停火或通过以色列继续战争。不能两者兼得”——伊朗外交部长阿拉格奇

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian delegation will be in Islamabad for talks tonight — Iran's ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam “Despite skepticism of Iranian public opinion due to repeated ceasefire violations by Israeli regime”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗代表团将于今晚在伊斯兰堡进行会谈——伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆表示：“尽管由于以色列政权屡次违反停火协议，伊朗公众舆论持怀疑态度”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 BBC: Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh says that the U.S. must choose a ceasefire or allowing Israeli strikes on Lebanon to continue. "US cannot have its cake & eat it. Trump must choose between a ceasefire & allowing its ally Israel to continue the war in Lebanon." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 BBC：伊朗副外长赛义德·哈提卜扎德表示，美国必须在停火与允许以色列继续打击黎巴嫩之间做出选择。“美国不能鱼与熊掌兼得。特朗普必须在停火和允许其盟友以色列继续在黎巴嫩作战之间做出选择。”@wfwitness

text: Sen. John Fetterman: Every single thing Iran done and is is an entire war crime.
text_zh: 参议员约翰·费特曼：伊朗所做和正在做的每一件事都是彻头彻尾的战争罪行。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 The IDF has released new footage of paratroopers under the 98th Division in southern Lebanon as Israeli continues cross border operations continue. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了第98师伞兵在黎巴嫩南部的新画面，以色列的跨境行动仍在继续。@wfwitness

text: The White House reviewed and approved the social media post by Pakistan’s prime minister, Shehbaz Sharif, before he published it urging Trump to extend a deadline with Iran. Source: NYT
text_zh: 白宫审查并批准了巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的社交媒体帖子，该帖子在他发布前敦促特朗普延长与伊朗的最后期限。来源：纽约时报

text: Q: Is the world safer today than it was before the war was started? Mark Rutte: Absolutely — and this is thanks to Trump's leadership.
text_zh: 问：与战争开始前相比，今天的世界更安全吗？马克·吕特：绝对如此——这要归功于特朗普的领导力。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg: The U.S. is pressing NATO allies to provide concrete plans within days to help secure the Strait of Hormuz once fighting with Iran subsides. The request was raised during meetings in Washington between U.S. President Trump and NATO Secretary-General Rutte, as well as in discussions at the Pentagon and State Department. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：美国正敦促北约盟友在数日内提供具体计划，以帮助在伊朗战事平息后确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全。这一要求是在华盛顿举行的美国总统特朗普与北约秘书长吕特的会议期间，以及五角大楼和国务院的讨论中提出的。@wfwitness

text: The U.S. is pushing its allies to move quickly on securing the Strait of Hormuz after the ceasefire, asking European countries to present concrete plans within days. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 美国正推动其盟友在停火后迅速行动以确保霍尔木兹海峡安全，要求欧洲国家在数日内提出具体计划。来源：彭博社

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ #Summary for the morning of April 9, 2026 ▪️ In Krasnodar Region, a man was killed in Sauk-Dere, UAVs crashed in Mekkertsuk and damaged a house in Slavyansk-na-Kubani. Enemy claims the target was a pipeline facility. Zelensky mentioned a ceasefire. UAVs were destroyed in Rostov Region. ▪️ Russian forces struck merchant vessels in Izmail, Odesa Region. Explosions occurred in Odesa, Pavlograd, Sumy and Kharkiv regions. ▪️ In Bryansk Region, the AFU attacked Demyanki, wounding a Bryanskenergo employee. A civilian was wounded in Novy Ropsk. ▪️ In Sumy, Grouping North achieved tactical successes, capturing an AFU soldier. ▪️ In Belgorod Region, civilians were wounded by drone strikes in Grayvoron, Shebekino and Belgorod. ▪️ In Kharkiv, Russian forces are advancing with heavy fighting in the Volchansk direction. ▪️ In Kupiansk, Russian forces are achieving success south of Pischane. ▪️ In Slavyansk, the AFU is counterattacking in Lipovka, while Russian forces are advancing south of Kaleniki. ▪️ In Dobropolsk, fighting continues in Novoaleksandrivka and Vasylivka. ▪️ In Dnipropetrovsk, the AFU's 82nd Brigade counterattacked but lost an APC. ▪️ In Zaporizhia, Grouping East is penetrating the enemy defense to free settlements. ▪️ On the Zaporizhia front, fighting continues in Primorsk and Stepnohirsk. ▪️ In Kherson, civilians were wounded, and Russian forces are striking with FAB-3000 and thermobaric munitions. Summary compiled by: Two Majors Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转自Rybar英文频道：转发自@ #2026年4月9日上午简报 ▪️ 在克拉斯诺达尔边疆区，一名男子在萨乌克-杰雷遇害，无人机在梅克克楚克坠毁，并在斯拉维扬斯克-纳-库巴尼损坏了一栋房屋。敌方声称目标是管道设施。泽连斯基提及了停火。罗斯托夫州有无人机被摧毁。▪️ 俄罗斯军队在敖德萨州伊兹梅尔袭击了商船。敖德萨、巴甫洛格勒、苏梅和哈尔科夫州发生爆炸。▪️ 在布良斯克州，乌军袭击了杰米扬基，造成一名布良斯克能源公司员工受伤。新罗普斯克有一名平民受伤。▪️ 在苏梅，北方集团取得战术成功，俘获一名乌军士兵。▪️ 在别尔哥罗德州，无人机袭击造成格雷沃龙、舍别基诺和别尔哥罗德平民受伤。▪️ 在哈尔科夫，俄军正在沃尔昌斯克方向激战推进。▪️ 在库皮扬斯克，俄军在皮夏涅以南取得进展。▪️ 在斯拉维扬斯克，乌军在利波夫卡反击，而俄军正在卡列尼基以南推进。▪️ 在多布罗波尔，新亚历山德里夫卡和瓦西里夫卡的战斗仍在继续。▪️ 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克，乌军第82旅反击但损失一辆装甲运兵车。▪️ 在扎波罗热，东方集团正突破敌军防线以解放定居点。▪️ 在扎波罗热前线，普里莫尔斯克和斯捷波诺希尔斯克的战斗仍在继续。▪️ 在赫尔松，平民受伤，俄军正在使用FAB-3000和温压弹药进行打击。简报整理：Two Majors 原始消息

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Begging season at the White House: Trump demands NATO plans for Strait he couldn't secure alone
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 白宫乞求季：特朗普要求北约制定他独自无法确保的海峡计划

text: 🇮🇷 💬 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 An Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad this evening for talks with the US , Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan Reza Amiri Moghadam reported. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 💬 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使礼萨·阿米里·穆加达姆报告，一个伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Strait of Hormuz may be included in the U.S.–Iran cease-fire, but in practice it’s still barely functioning. No oil or gas tankers have passed through since the agreement, and only a handful of cargo ships have crossed. Even where passage might be possible, most shipping companies remain cautious and are avoiding the route. Source: NYT
text_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡可能被纳入美伊停火协议，但实际上其功能仍几近停滞。自协议达成以来，未有油轮或天然气运输船通过，仅有少数货船穿越。即使在可能通航的区域，多数航运公司仍持谨慎态度，避开该航线。来源：纽约时报

text: Iran plans to charge oil tankers cryptocurrency fees to pass through the Strait of Hormuz during the two-week ceasefire, while inspecting ships for weapons. Authorities say vessels must request permission, disclose cargo, and quickly pay about $1 per barrel in crypto. Ships that don’t comply risk being targeted. Source: FT
text_zh: 伊朗计划在为期两周的停火期间，对通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收取加密货币费用，同时检查船只是否携带武器。当局表示，船只必须申请许可、披露货物，并快速支付每桶约1美元的加密货币。不遵守规定的船只可能成为目标。来源：FT

text: Trump: The Failing New York Times and Fake News CNN each reported a totally FAKE TEN POINT PLAN on the Iran negotiations which was meant to discredit the people involved in the peace process. All ten points were a made up HOAX - EVIL LOSERS!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：《失败的纽约时报》和假新闻CNN各自报道了一份完全虚假的关于伊朗谈判的十点计划，旨在诋毁参与和平进程的人员。所有十点都是捏造的骗局——邪恶的失败者！！！

text: Trump: All U.S. Ships, Aircraft, and Military Personnel, with additional Ammunition, Weaponry, and anything else that is appropriate and necessary for the lethal prosecution and destruction of an already substantially degraded Enemy, will remain in place in, and around, Iran, until such time as the REAL AGREEMENT reached is fully complied with. If for any reason it is not, which is highly unlikely, then the “Shootin’ Starts,” bigger, and better, and stronger than anyone has ever seen before. It was agreed, a long time ago, and despite all of the fake rhetoric to the contrary - NO NUCLEAR WEAPONS and, the Strait of Hormuz WILL BE OPEN & SAFE. In the meantime our great Military is Loading Up and Resting, looking forward, actually, to its next Conquest. AMERICA IS BACK!
text_zh: 特朗普：所有美国船只、飞机和军事人员，以及额外的弹药、武器和任何其他适当且必要用于致命打击和摧毁已大幅削弱的敌人的物资，将继续驻扎在伊朗境内及周边地区，直至真正达成的协议得到完全遵守。如果因任何原因未能遵守（这极不可能），那么“射击开始”，规模更大、效果更好、力量更强，前所未见。这是很久以前达成的协议，尽管存在所有相反的虚假言辞——没有核武器，霍尔木兹海峡将保持开放与安全。与此同时，我们伟大的军队正在装载物资并休整，实际上，正期待着下一次征服。美国回来了！

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Reuters : British Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper is expected to call for shipping through the Strait of Hormuz must remain toll-free, rejecting Iran’s plan to charge fees, during her foreign policy speech at Mansion House. She will stress that freedom of navigation cannot be unilaterally withdrawn or sold and must remain open to all. Cooper is also expected to call for Lebanon to be included in the U.S.-Iran two-week ceasefire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 路透社：英国外交大臣伊薇特·库珀预计将在其于Mansion House的外交政策演讲中，呼吁霍尔木兹海峡的航运必须保持免费通行，拒绝伊朗的收费计划。她将强调航行自由不能被单方面撤销或出售，必须对所有国家开放。库珀还预计将呼吁将黎巴嫩纳入美伊为期两周的停火协议中。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. officials report that gridlock over reopening the Strait of Hormuz could lead to hostilities reigniting. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：美国官员报告称，重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的僵局可能导致敌对行动再次爆发。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Islamabad's Serena Hotel has been requsitioned by the Pakistani government until Sunday evening. This is likely the venue for negotiations between the U.S. and Iran this weekend. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊斯兰堡的塞雷纳酒店已被巴基斯坦政府征用至周日晚。这很可能是本周末美伊谈判的地点。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Ambassador to Pakistan says the Iranian delegation will arrive in Islamabad tonight for “serious talks” based on the 10 points proposed by Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗驻巴基斯坦大使表示，伊朗代表团将于今晚抵达伊斯兰堡，就伊朗提出的10点建议进行“严肃会谈”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 WSJ: Ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz remained extremely limited on Wednesday, despite President Donald Trump calling for its immediate reopening as part of the ceasefire conditions. The NJ Earth, sailing under a Greek flag, and the Daytona Beach, sailing under a Liberian flag, were the first to transit through the Strait of Hormuz. hipping uncertainty remains high, with reports that some operators have paid fees exceeding $1 million to secure passage, highlighting continued risks to global energy and trade flows. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 华尔街日报：尽管总统唐纳德·特朗普作为停火条件的一部分呼吁立即重新开放，周三霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通仍然极其有限。悬挂希腊国旗的‘新泽西地球’号和悬挂利比里亚国旗的‘代托纳海滩’号率先通过霍尔木兹海峡。航运不确定性依然很高，有报道称一些运营商已支付超过100万美元的费用以确保通行，突显了全球能源和贸易流动的持续风险。@wfwitness

text: Daily summary on the key news of the past 24 hours! — Israel unleashes ‘largest’ bombing wave in Lebanon since start of operation over a month ago. More than '100 targets/residential area' struck in just 10 minutes across central Beirut, southern suburbs, the south, and the Bekaa. — Natanyahu says the ceasefire does not include Lebanon. — White House does not acknowledge the 10-point proposal. — After Israel’s attack on Lebanon, all ship traffic through Strait of Hormuz STOPPED — Fars News. — Israel killed another Journalist in Gaza. — 254 killed, 1,165 injured in today’s Israeli strikes across Lebanon — preliminary Civil Defense toll. — UAE attacked Iran hours after the ceasefire. Iran retaliated by attacking Fujairah UAE.
text_zh: 过去24小时关键新闻每日摘要！ — 以色列发动自行动开始一个多月以来对黎巴嫩的'最大规模'轰炸波。仅在10分钟内，贝鲁特中部、南部郊区、南部及贝卡谷地就有超过'100个目标/住宅区'遭袭。 — 内塔尼亚胡表示停火不包括黎巴嫩。 — 白宫未承认10点提议。 — 据法尔斯通讯社报道，以色列袭击黎巴嫩后，所有船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的航行已停止。 — 以色列在加沙又杀害一名记者。 — 据民防部门初步统计，今日以色列对黎巴嫩各地的袭击造成254人死亡，1165人受伤。 — 停火数小时后，阿联酋袭击伊朗。伊朗通过袭击富查伊拉阿联酋进行反击。

text: ⚡️ IMF, World Bank, and WFP Warn: West Asia War Fuels Global Food Insecurity The three organizations issued a joint statement warning that the ongoing war in the West Asia has triggered one of the largest disruptions to global energy markets in modern history. Sharp rises in oil, natural gas, and fertilizer prices, along with transport bottlenecks, will inevitably drive up food prices and worsen food insecurity worldwide.
text_zh: ⚡️ 国际货币基金组织、世界银行和世界粮食计划署警告：西亚战争加剧全球粮食不安全 三家机构联合声明警告，持续的西亚战争已引发现代史上对全球能源市场最大规模之一的冲击。石油、天然气和化肥价格飙升，加上运输瓶颈，将不可避免地推高食品价格，加剧全球粮食不安全状况。

text: New nukes which Iran doesn't have and open the Hormoz which was open before the war. Great. Now F off please
text_zh: 伊朗没有的新核武器，以及战前就已开放的霍尔木兹海峡。很好。现在请滚开吧

text: 🇺🇸 Trump, posting about US troops remaining around Iran, says the U.S. military is “looking forward” to its “next conquest.”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普在谈及美军继续驻留伊朗周边时表示，美国军队正“期待”着其“下一次征服”。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Massive crowds gathered across Iran demanding a firm response to the enemy’s ceasefire violation.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 伊朗多地聚集大规模人群，要求对敌人违反停火协议的行为作出坚决回应。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 The IRGC Navy released a map of the new shipping lane for the Strait of Hormuz due to the possiblitiy of anti-shipping mines placed during the conflict. The entry route is from the Sea of Oman northwards to Larak island and then towards the Persian Gulf. The exit route is following the entry in reverse order. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军发布了霍尔木兹海峡新航道图，因冲突期间可能布设反舰水雷。入口路线从阿曼海向北至拉拉克岛，然后驶向波斯湾。出口路线按入口反向行驶。@wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 “In this war I became 100% with Hezbollah”: Lebanese Woman’s Powerful Message Against Israeli Terror
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 “在这场战争中，我百分百支持真主党”：黎巴嫩女性针对以色列恐怖主义的强烈讯息

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lapid confirmed. Israel was not at the negotiations table. That's what is driving Netanyahu insane?
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 拉皮德证实。以色列未参与谈判桌。这令内塔尼亚胡抓狂？

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 Bloomberg: The Trump administration is working with Venezuela’s interim government to potentially transfer Alex Saab, a prominent Maduro administration moneyman, to the United States to face prosecution in what would be a najor advance in cooperation between the two countries. Officials say Caracas is exploring legal avenues to revoke Saab’s Venezuelan citizenship, as the country’s constitution prohibits extraditing its own nationals. U.S. officials have already talked with Saab in Caracas, pressing him to reveal where former Venezuelan President Maduro's assets are. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 彭博社：特朗普政府正与委内瑞拉临时政府合作，可能将马杜罗政府重要资金管理人亚历克斯·萨博移交美国受审，这将是两国合作的一大进展。官员称加拉加斯正探索法律途径撤销萨博的委内瑞拉国籍，因该国宪法禁止引渡本国公民。美国官员已在加拉加斯与萨博会面，施压其透露前委内瑞拉总统马杜罗资产去向。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Trump: army 'remain IN IRAN' 'To next Conquest'
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 特朗普：军队‘继续留在伊朗’‘为下一场征服’

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Trump gave Netanyahu the green light to continue pummeling Lebanon, and thus violate the terms of Trump's own ceasefire, almost immediately upon Trump announcing it. Barak Ravid about Trump to Netanyahu: “You can continue on doing what you’re doing in Lebanon.”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 特朗普几乎在宣布停火的同时，就给了内塔尼亚胡继续打击黎巴嫩的绿灯，从而违反了他自己提出的停火条件。巴拉克·拉维德转达特朗普对内塔尼亚胡的话：‘你们可以继续在黎巴嫩的行动。’

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump ordered all U.S. military assets in the Middle East to remain in place until a final deal with Iran is agreed to. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普命令所有美国在中东的军事资产保持原位，直至与伊朗达成最终协议。@wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 UAE President MBZ's Advisor Anwar Gargash: The UAE triumphed in a war we sincerely sought to avoid, and we prevailed through an epic national defense that safeguarded sovereignty and dignity and protected our achievements in the face of treacherous aggression. Our strength, resilience, and steadfastness have reinforced the UAE's renaissance model.
text_zh: 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 阿联酋总统穆罕默德·本·扎耶德的顾问安瓦尔·加尔加什：阿联酋在一场我们真诚希望避免的战争中取得了胜利，我们通过一场捍卫主权与尊严、保护我们成就免受背叛性侵略的史诗级国防取得了胜利。我们的力量、韧性和坚定性强化了阿联酋的复兴模式。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Susan Khalil (Al-Manar TV) and Ghada Al-Dayekh (Sawt Al-Farah radio) were martyred in yesterday’s Zionist attacks on Lebanon.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 苏珊·哈利勒（Al-Manar电视台）和加达·阿尔-达耶克（Sawt Al-Farah广播电台）在昨日犹太复国主义对黎巴嫩的袭击中殉难。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: U.S. President Trump interjected during a meeting on Iranian ceasefire negotiations to list the number of bridges and power plants he was prepared to strike, telling aides that the Iranian government would be responsible if any of the U.S. strikes killed Iranians gathered around the structures. Prior to the announcement of the last minute ceasefire agreement, talks had privately been progressing with Supreme Leader of Iran Khamenei appearing to approve of negotiations moving forward on Monday. But on Tuesday morning the White House had grown impatient, leading to Trump posting his threat against Iran. This lead Iranian leaders, furious over Trump threatening to strike critical infrastructure, to pass a message along through Pakistan that communication with the U.S. would cease, believing that Iranian control over the Strait of Hormuz gave them the upper hand. It was China that was able to break the impass in negotiations by telling Iran to think of the economic impact on their allies, such as China, of keeping the Strait closed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：美国总统特朗普在伊朗停火谈判会议中插话，列举了他准备打击的桥梁和发电厂数量，并告诉助手，如果美军袭击导致聚集在这些建筑周围的伊朗人死亡，伊朗政府将对此负责。在最后一刻停火协议宣布之前，谈判私下里一直在取得进展，伊朗最高领袖哈梅内伊似乎于周一批准了谈判继续进行。但周二上午，白宫已失去耐心，导致特朗普发布了对伊朗的威胁。这激怒了伊朗领导人，他们对特朗普威胁打击关键基础设施感到愤怒，并通过巴基斯坦传递消息，表示将终止与美国的沟通，认为伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的控制让他们占据上风。正是中国通过告诉伊朗考虑关闭海峡对其盟友（如中国）的经济影响，才打破了谈判的僵局。@wfwitness
